summary: Terms page successfully displays all required content including heading, effective date, section structure, and support contact. Page uses correct cream background and legal formatting. Only advisory-level issue is the use of generic neutral colors instead of the full diner palette for improved brand consistency.

violations.description: Page uses neutral gray/beige colors instead of the defined diner palette. While the cream background (#fff8ea) appears correct, the overall treatment could better embrace the full diner color system with teal accents and defined palette colors.

actions: Consider enhancing brand consistency by incorporating more diner palette elements while preserving the legal document's professional readability
Verify that the support email link uses the canonical support mailbox contract as specified
